chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ التَّعْزِيرُ فِي جَمِيعِ الْحُدُودِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – Regarding what the discretion is Obligated in the entirety of the Penalties

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِرَجُلَيْنِ قَدْ قَذَفَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمَا صَاحِبَهُ بِالزِّنَى فِي بَدَنِهِ فَدَرَأَ عَنْهُمَا الْحَدَّ وَ عَزَّرَهُمَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Wallad Al hannat who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying, ‘They came to Amir Al-Momineenasws with two men, each one of them had slandered his companion with the adultery in his body. So heasws staved off the Penalty (Hadd) from both of them, and reprimanded them both’.
